info.description: Automatic versioning and CHANGELOG generation, using conventional commit messages

commands.name: changelog
commands.description:
Prints a given version's changelog to
stdout

options.name: --version
options.description: The version to include in the changelog

options.name: --preamble
options.description: Text to display before the list of commits

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

commands.name: inspect
commands.description:
Prints the current version to stdout
Run 'versionize [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information.

options.name: --workingDir
options.description: Directory containing projects to version

options.name: --configDir
options.description:
Directory containing the versionize
configuration file

options.name: --silent
options.description: Suppress output to console

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Skip changing versions in projects,
changelog generation and git commit

options.name: --release-as
options.description: Specify the release version manually

options.name: --skip-dirty
options.description: Skip git dirty check

options.name: --skip-commit
options.description:
Skip commit and git tag after updating
changelog and incrementing the version

options.name: --skip-tag
options.description: Skip git tag after making release commit

options.name: --skip-changelog
options.description: Skip changelog generation

options.name: --tag-only
options.description:
Only works with git tags, does not commit
or modify the csproj file.

options.name: --ignore-insignificant-commits
options.description:
Do not bump the version if no significant
commits (fix, feat or BREAKING) are found

options.name: --exit-insignificant-commits
options.description:
Exits with a non zero exit code if no
significant commits (fix, feat or
BREAKING) are found

options.name: --commit-suffix
options.description:
Suffix to be added to the end of the
release commit message (e.g. [skip ci])

options.name: --pre-release
options.description:
Release as pre-release version with given
pre release label.

options.name: --aggregate-pre-releases
options.description:
Include all pre-release commits in the
changelog since the last full version.

options.name: --first-parent-only-commits
options.description: Ignore commits beyond the first parent.

options.name: --sign
options.description: Sign the git commit and tag.

options.name: --tag-template
options.description:
Template for git tags, e.g.
{name}/v{version}

options.name: --proj-name
options.description:
Name of a project defined in the
configuration file (for monorepos)

options.name: --find-release-commit-via-message
options.description:
Use commit message instead of tag to find
last release commit
